response:
The city between Normanby le Wold and the A46 Junction between Lincoln and Grimsby is **Caistor**. 

This is stated in the context: "It is in the civil parish of Claxby by Normanby. Caistor is a town and civil parish situated in the West Lindsey district of Lincolnshire, England. It lies at the north-west edge of the Lincolnshire Wolds, on the Viking Way, and just off the A46 between Lincoln and Grimsby, at the A46, A1084, A1173 and B1225 junction."
